Event: The Arcane Adventure
Event Date: 08/08/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E50
Cleansing Flame Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the unit sets 2 random enemies on fire. The burning enemies take 58800 / 84000 / 120000 / 160000 / 200000 / 250000 / 350000 magic damage and have their healing rate reduced by 35% for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 2
2000 Magic damage from the gems
Once in a while, the unit starts incinerating 3 random enemies for 4 sec. The enemies take 29400 / 42000 / 50000 / 80000 / 100000 / 125000 / 165000 pure damage every second for 4 sec, and all enemies in a small radius around the incinerated units take pure damage equal to 55% / 56% / 57% / 58% / 60% / 62% / 65% of the damage taken by the original targets. When the incineration wears off, the ability's targets are weakened. Their max health, fortitude, physical and magic armor are reduced by 25% / 26% / 27% / 28% / 30% / 32% / 35% for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 3
4000 Magic damage from the gems
Once in a while, 4 random enemy units have 5 random positive effects removed from them. Then the unit starts incinerating the targets for 5 sec. The enemies take 35300 / 50400 / 72000 / 96000 / 120000 / 150000 /
190000 pure damage every second for 5 sec, and all enemies in a small radius around the Incinerated units take pure damage equal to 60% / 61% / 62% / 63% / 65% / 67% / 70% of the damage taken by the original targets. When the incineration wears off, the ability's targets are weakened. Their max health, fortitude, physical and magic armor are reduced by 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40% for 3 sec.

Requirements:

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 9 secs
